title: DiscoverRefsOutput
description: Output of 'discover refs'. Reads from catalog/tables/<name>.json referenced_by. No AST parsing, no BFS, no confidence scoring.

name.description: Normalized FQN of the target object.

type.description: Catalog object type. Present when the object was found in the catalog.

source.description: Always 'catalog' — data comes from setup-ddl catalog files.

error.description: Explanation when the object was not found in any catalog. Present only on lookup failure.

readers.description: Normalized FQNs of procedures/views that SELECT from the target (is_selected=true, is_updated=false).

writers.description: Procedures/views that write to the target (is_updated=true).

procedure.description: Normalized FQN of the writing procedure/view.

write_type.description: Always 'direct' — catalog reports direct references only.

is_selected.description: True if the writer also reads from the target.

is_insert_all.description: True if the writer uses INSERT with all columns.
